action.reasoning: Observation: iter_5 ran 100 epochs with ConvNeXt-tiny, best val_acc=0.7560 (achieved early). Training accuracy reached ~99% while val_acc dropped to ~0.61, showing severe overfitting. The best checkpoint was saved at val_acc=0.7560. Analysis: This is much better than the previous best of 0.6525. Need to submit this checkpoint for eval. The model overfits badly - need stronger regularization. Decision: Submit eval with current best.pt, then improve with stronger dropout/regularization and early stopping.
